mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_review (book_id, reader_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{readerId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT br.id, br.book_id, br.reader_id, br.rating, br.content, br.create_time, br.update_time FROM book_review br WHERE br.book_id = #{bookId} AND br.status = 1 ORDER BY br.create_time DESC
SELECT id, book_id, reader_id, rating, content, create_time, update_time FROM book_review WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_review WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 1

SELECT br.id, br.book_id AS bookId, br.reader_id AS readerId, r.real_name AS readerName, br.content, br.rating, br.create_time AS createTime, COALESCE(rl.like_count, 0) AS likeCount FROM book_review br LEFT JOIN reader r ON br.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT review_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM review_like GROUP BY review_id ) rl ON br.id = rl.review_id WHERE br.book_id = #{bookId} AND br.status = 1 ORDER BY br.create_time DESC

SELECT br.id, br.book_id AS bookId, br.reader_id AS readerId, b.title AS bookTitle, br.content, br.rating, br.create_time AS createTime, COALESCE(rl.like_count, 0) AS likeCount FROM book_review br LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT review_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM review_like GROUP BY review_id ) rl ON br.id = rl.review_id WHERE br.reader_id = #{readerId} AND br.status = 1 ORDER BY br.create_time DESC
